problem_statement: A complete undirected graph (K_9) has 9 vertices. Calculate the total number of edges in this graph. Explain your reasoning and state the final count of edges clearly as a single integer.
verification_script:
def verify(response):
    import re
    # Find any numbers in the response
    numbers = re.findall(r"\b\d+\b", response)
    # Check if the target number is in the numbers list
    if str(36) in numbers:
        return True
    return False
